## Summary

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature within current Codex + Claude Code scope
- [ ] Test or CI improvement
- [ ] Other

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, runtime state, logs, or generated dependency folders are included
- [ ] License/commercial-use expectations remain intact
- [ ] Handoff/event/lease behavior is documented if changed
- [ ] Unverified behavior is not described as guaranteed
- [ ] Tests or manual verification are described below
- [ ] Stabilization freeze respected: no new agent types, workflow categories, scheduler features, or provider integrations unless explicitly scoped
- [ ] Checklist-decomposition behavior is stated: production-default path, deterministic test path, or explicit non-applicability
- [ ] Dry-run/live GitHub side effects are stated; no push, PR creation, merge, comment, or issue close is implied without explicit verification
- [ ] Execution-kernel changes preserve recovery ownership, crash-barrier state, event ordering, provider handoff telemetry, and audit finalization
- [ ] Type-gate impact is stated for `core/engine` broad-any/cast debt when touched
- [ ] Flagship GitHub Issue -> evidence-backed draft PR dry-run gate passed or is explicitly not applicable, with artifact paths listed below

## Verification

-
